form:Form.mess: ¿Está seguro que desa cancelar la operación?
form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.EntregaUniforme.CONSULTA

form:Button.mess: ¿Está seguro que desea cancelar la operación?
form:Button.label: Cancelar
form:Button.name: CANCEL

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT MAX(ORG16_UNIF_REC.f_recuento) as f_recuento, ORG16_UNIF_REC.e_cantidad as cant FROM ORG16_UNIF_REC WHERE ORG16_UNIF_REC.oi_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@oi_uniforme} GROUP BY ORG16_UNIF_REC.e_cantidad ORDER BY f_recuento ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(PER02_UNIF_PER.e_cantidad) as cant FROM PER02_UNIF_PER WHERE PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@oi_uniforme} AND PER02_UNIF_PER.f_desde >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_recuento)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2_1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(PER02_DEV_UNIF.e_cantidad) as cant FROM PER02_DEV_UNIF, PER02_UNIF_PER JOIN PER02_DEV_UNIF.oi_uniforme_per INNER PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme_per WHERE PER02_DEV_UNIF.l_repone_stock = 1 AND PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@oi_uniforme} AND PER02_DEV_UNIF.f_dev_unif >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_recuento)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(ORG16_UNIF_REP.e_cant_repuesta) as cant FROM ORG16_UNIF_REP WHERE ORG16_UNIF_REP.oi_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@oi_uniforme} AND ORG16_UNIF_REP.f_reposicion >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_recuento)} ')/ROWS/ROW
